prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 55 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 49–55 名区间；2023 年声誉评价中性/混合（图书馆表白墙事件），未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 102，评价"一般"，曝光度不高；作物学 A+、植物保护 A+、食品科学与工程 A、兽医学 A-、畜牧学 A-，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 农林类相关专业社会热度一般；本省 2026 年考生总数约 37.79 万，较 2025 年约 28.57 万增长约 32.3%，竞争明显加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动较大、2026 年计划扩招约 15.2% 及本省考生大幅增加约 32.3%，考生增幅超过扩招幅度，竞争整体加剧；在 2024 年基准 15294 名基础上预计位次后移；预测最低位次约 16734 名，区间 16234–17234 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for science students was approximately 16005 → 14677 → 17451 → 15294, showing significant fluctuations overall, with a notable backward shift in 2023 (17451) and a recovery to 15294 in 2024; for 2025 Physics Category, based on the 2024 ranking of 15294; the provincial science enrollment plan from 2021 to 2024 was 87 → 90 → 93 → 99 students respectively, with a gradual small expansion each year; the 2026 Physics Category plan is 114 students, an increase of about 15.2% compared to 2024, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately ranked 55th on the Soft Science main list (2026), with stable rankings in the 49–55 range in recent years; the 2023 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (library confession wall incident), with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 102, with a rating of 'average', low exposure; Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, Animal Science A-, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of agriculture and forestry related majors is generally average; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 377,900, an increase of about 32.3% compared to approximately 285,700 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the large fluctuations in historical rankings, the planned enrollment expansion of about 15.2% in 2026, and the significant increase of about 32.3% in provincial examinees, the growth in examinees exceeds the expansion rate, intensifying overall competition; based on the 2024 benchmark of 15294, the ranking is expected to shift backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16734, with a range of 16234–17234.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 16234–17234, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 flagship majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<16234), you can focus on Tier 1 majors such as Seed Science and Engineering, Agronomy, and Plant Protection, which are A+ disciplines.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 55 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定；2023 年声誉评价中性/混合；抖音热度排名第 102，评价"一般"，无明显报考热度信号；作物学 A+、植物保护 A+、食品科学与工程 A 等，但文科组招生专业（社会学类、英语）与优势学科关联较弱。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次明显后移趋势、2026 年计划大幅扩招约 85.7% 及本省考生增加约 32.3%，扩招幅度远超考生增幅，竞争整体缓解；在 2025 年基准 3286 名基础上预计位次后移（更容易进）；预测最低位次约 4946 名，区间 4446–5446 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2664→2712→2848→2679→3286. In 2025, due to the reform of the examination mode (liberal arts → history category), the ranking significantly shifted backward by about 607 places, with a cumulative backward shift of about 622 places over the past 5 years. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 6 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 7 students in 2025. In 2026, the history category plan is 13 students, a substantial expansion of about 85.7% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 55th (2026), stable in recent years; reputation evaluation neutral/mixed in 2023; Douyin popularity ranking 102nd, rated as "average", no obvious signal of application popularity; Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, etc., but the liberal arts group enrollment majors (Sociology, English) are weakly related to the advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts enrollment majors (Sociology, English) have stable social popularity; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is approximately 377,900, an increase of about 32.3% compared to approximately 285,700 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift trend in 2025 rankings, the substantial expansion of the 2026 plan by about 85.7%, and the increase in provincial examinees by about 32.3%, the expansion rate far exceeds the examinee growth rate, easing overall competition; based on the 2025 benchmark of 3286, the ranking is expected to shift backward (easier to enter); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4946, with a range of 4446–5446.

- Public Administration (including Land Resource Management, Human Resource Management, Labor and Social Security, Administrative Management)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The liberal arts group has only 2–3 enrollment majors, with rankings within the predicted range of 4446–5446. It is recommended to prioritize Sociology/Public Administration, supplemented by English; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4446), Sociology can be considered as a key option.
